question: 系统里有多少个报价单？
列出所有状态为草稿的报价单
verify_sql: SELECT name FROM quotations WHERE status='draft' ORDER BY name LIMIT 5;

question: 线体报价单有哪些？各有多少子报价单？
verify_sql:
SELECT q.name, COUNT(c.id) as child_count
            FROM quotations q
            LEFT JOIN quotations c ON c.parent_id = q.id
            WHERE q.type='line' AND q.parent_id IS NULL
            GROUP BY q.id, q.name
            ORDER BY q.name;

question: 谁创建了最多的报价单？前 5 名
verify_sql:
SELECT u.real_name, COUNT(q.id) as cnt
            FROM quotations q
            JOIN users u ON u.id = q.creator_id
            GROUP BY u.id, u.real_name
            ORDER BY cnt DESC
            LIMIT 5;

question: 平均报价金额是多少？
verify_sql: SELECT AVG(total_amount) FROM quotations WHERE total_amount IS NOT NULL;

question: 差旅费最贵的是哪几个报价单？前 5
verify_sql:
SELECT q.name, SUM(te.amount) as total_travel
            FROM quotations q
            JOIN travel_entries te ON te.quotation_id = q.id
            GROUP BY q.id, q.name
            ORDER BY total_travel DESC NULLS LAST
            LIMIT 5;
